# USNow.app
> usnow.app | It's Not AI, It's Organized Intelligence
> copyrighted May 1, 2026

USNow is a civic and cultural knowledge platform organized as an interactive map of everything that touches human life — from personal identity and family to politics, history, science, and the cosmos. It covers 1,297 topics across 7 layers: ME MYSELF & I, ORIGINS, COMMUNITY & CULTURE, KNOWLEDGE & LEARNING, POWER & POLITICS, HISTORY & CIVILIZATION, and EVEN FURTHER BACK.

The site is built for exploration, not consumption. Topics are connected through a web of cross-links, related concepts, and curated offsite sources. The voice is plain, factual, and unflinching — never academic, never preachy.

## Full Content Index
The complete text of over 1200 topic descriptions is available at:
https://usnow.app/llms-full.txt

## Built-in Glossary
The World Compendium defines key terms used across the site, cross-referenced and indexed throughout.

## Author
usnow.app
